macro.title: M/I, Meritage team up to fund $7.6M bridge to growth in a Texas town
macro.what: M/I Homes and Meritage Homes split the cost of a $7.6 million bridge connecting an upcoming 496-home community with the City of Buda's downtown commercial core
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: How high can mortgage rates go with Iran conflict 2.0?
macro.what: As the 10-year nears 4.60%, rates could test 6.75%, but improved spreads and pricing suggest an upside cap near 7.25%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Pending Home Sales Slip Amid Stubbornly High Housing Costs, Economic Uncertainty
macro.what: Would-be sellers backed off, too, with new listings falling to their lowest level since the start of 2026
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The Holiday acquisition is about Daiwa House’s next decade
housing.what: The long game Was never about one Acquisition Viewed through a sharply narrowed lens of a single transaction, Holiday Builders adds another respected, cycle-tested, deeply regionally invested homebuilder to Stanley Martin Homes‘ growing portfolio
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: AD Mortgage flags condo reserve rules in FHFA letter
housing.what: AD Mortgage launched a policy initiative and urged FHFA to watch condo rule changes, noting 30% of projects reviewed fell below 15% reserves.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Behind closed doors: The next phase of Compass’s Code of Ethics complaints against Zillow
housing.what: Compass filed ethics complaints against Zillow across 26 states, raising focus on confidentiality, hearings, discipline, and appeals.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Starter home inventory trails 2019 by 300,000 listings, per new data
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: The housing market not normalizing, as affordability failure persists
housing.what: We are not in a “normalizing” housing market
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Beachfront Florida and Coastal California Ruled June’s Ultra-Luxury Home Sales
housing.what: The most expensive home sale of June was a $71 million waterfront estate near Palm Beach, followed by a Beverly Hills compound
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The Home Search Landscape is Changing. If You’re Not on Redfin, You May Be Missing Homes for Sale.
housing.what: Traditionally, most homes for sale appear on all the major real estate portals the day they list
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Affordable, Inland College Towns Buck National Trends, Seeing Double-Digit Home Price Growth and Fast Sales
housing.what: Morgantown, WV, Syracuse, NY and Tuscaloosa, AL, lead U.S
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Better Weather Is the Top Reason Americans Are Planning Out-of-State Moves, Outranking Affordability
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Redfin Partners With The Weather Company to Bring Weather Data to Every Home Listing
housing.what: Homebuyers can now view temperature, precipitation, snowfall, humidity and UV index information on all for-sale listings When you’re buying a home, it’s about more than bedrooms, bathrooms and square footage
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Compass moves from AI content creation to AI task execution in Home Platform
notables.what: Compass launched AI Assistant inside Home Platform, using agent data to automate follow ups, record updates, and daily briefings
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: NEXA Lending and former partner Mat Grella end legal fight
notables.what: NEXA Lending CEO Mike Kortas says the settlement ends all Grella lawsuits and gives him 100% ownership of NEXA after years of litigation.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Windermere names Diana Wall chief growth officer
notables.what: Windermere created a chief growth officer role, hiring Diana Wall to lead franchise growth, M&A, and market entry across its platform.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
